source_reference.source_label: Observed short-form pattern: desk timer automation demo

useful_curiosity.why_useful: Shows a small automation that reduces context switching during focused work.
useful_curiosity.why_surprising: The payoff appears quickly because a simple desk timer triggers a visible workflow change.
useful_curiosity.daily_problem_solved: Forgetting to start focus mode, silence notifications, or track sessions.

pattern_summary: A short demo opens with a common productivity failure, shows a compact tool, and ends with a simple automated routine that feels easy to copy.

extracted_format.opening_moment: Creator shows a cluttered desk and missed notification focus setup.
extracted_format.problem_solved: Starting a repeatable focus routine without manual app switching.
extracted_format.audience_pain: People who want a clean desk workflow but forget to prepare their digital tools.
extracted_format.payoff: A single button or timer creates a visible focus mode routine.
extracted_format.safe_original_remake_idea: Film an original RAIZ desk setup where a generic timer starts a local focus checklist, then show an original screen recording of notifications being silenced.

mode_specific_analysis.tool_or_product_shown: desk timer or focus button category
mode_specific_analysis.affiliate_potential_notes: Can recommend a general desk timer, focus button, or phone stand category without claiming guaranteed productivity results.

rights_review.notes: Use a new script, original desk footage, and owned screen recordings.

risks: Avoid showing private notifications or sensitive app content.

opportunities.title: One Button Focus Desk Setup
opportunities.original_production_idea: Create an original 30-second RAIZ short where a simple desk timer triggers a focus checklist: phone face down, notifications silenced, note app opened, and task card visible.
opportunities.target_audience: Creators, students, and remote workers who want a cleaner focus routine.
opportunities.value_proposition: A practical desk workflow that feels useful immediately and can be recreated with common tools.

scenes.original_asset_needed: Owned desk footage with staged notifications.

scenes.purpose: Show the timer or focus button category.
scenes.original_asset_needed: Owned close-up product footage or licensed stock.
Original screen recording with no private data.

rights_plan.attribution_notes: No source footage, audio, captions, or creator identity reused.

safety_constraints: Do not claim guaranteed productivity results.
Disclose affiliate relationship in future publishing workflow.
